notes: First real-data run. PO headline KPIs, monthly trend, adoption, source mix, and health rates are live from Redshift entrata_entrata. Rejection-reason breakdown deferred (needs tighter time window; see po-rejection-reasons.json). Invoice datasets remain provisional (Pallavi's SQL still has placeholders per DEV-253879).
known_data_gaps: clients.details JSONB is not mirrored to Redshift, so Rapid vs Standard cluster split is unavailable. Live-client filter (company_status_type_id=4) still applied.
rule_stop_results table is not mirrored, so system_routing_hours / approver_wait_hours cannot be computed. Related CTEs stubbed to empty; downstream metrics report as NULL.
GMV totals use a $1M/PO cap to exclude data-entry outliers (max unfiltered = $5.4T, p99 = $9,500).
Vendor Marketplace, API, and Work Order > Add PO source categories return zero counts in the mirror; may indicate source/scheduled_ap_header_id/company_user_type_id fields need DBRE follow-up.
